things.name: Neutrality Monument
things.description: Tripod tower topped with a golden rotating statue of Turkmenbashi revolving to face the sun

things.name: National Museum of Turkmenistan
things.description: Largest museum in Central Asia with Parthian gold and Silk Road artefacts

things.name: Darvaza Gas Crater (Door to Hell)
things.description: Burning natural gas crater in the Karakum Desert - an otherworldly sight 260km from Ashgabat

things.name: Tolkuchka Bazaar
things.description: One of Central Asia's largest open-air markets with camels, carpets and traditional dress

things.name: Turkmenbashi Ruhy Mosque
things.description: Central Asia's largest mosque accommodating 10,000 worshippers with golden domes

things.name: Olympic Stadium & Sports Complex
things.description: 2017 Asian Indoor Games complex - one of the world's most extravagant sports venues

things.name: Carpet Museum
things.description: World's largest collection of hand-woven Turkmen carpets including the world's largest rug

things.name: Ahal Teke Horse Stud
things.description: Legendary Akhal-Teke horses - the world's most beautiful breed with metallic sheen

things.name: Ancient Merv (Mary)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Silk Road oasis city - once the world's largest city in the 12th century

things.name: Parthian Fortress of Nisa
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage capital of the ancient Parthian Empire near Ashgabat
